plugins.name: pm-toolkit
plugins.description: PM leadership toolkit with 46 skills, 5 orchestrator agents, and 5 multi-stage workflows. Covers PRD generation, OKR lifecycle, pricing strategy, AI pricing, competitive intelligence, sales enablement, quarterly planning, migration planning, and more. Domain-agnostic via domain-context.md.
